subcodes.first_line: O troubled branch of the blessed tree! How long wilt thou remain immersed in the sea of sorrows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المهموم من الشجره المبارکه تا چند در بحر احزان مستغرقید مگر مبتلا
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @The Holy Spirit, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
